name: ⊗Cyn/Saint⊗
description:
Mostly made this for fun. Based on a crossover rp between rainworld and murder drones i am doing with a friend.

If you have problems with this bot let me know and I will do my best to fix it.

Finally Janitor ai has added lorebooks, so i made a lore book for this bot with pebbles and moon, along with sliver of straw. Also added every region and sub region in game except for the watcher dlc or rubicon.

Art by me.
creator: ScarletTrashPanda
